features: NEON INDICATOR - The neon indicator notifies you that your extension cable has been powered and is on ready for you to use - This has been designed for safety reasons to make sure you turn your cable off when leaving the house
4 WAY SOCKET - The 4 way UK plug outlets are suitable for UK power adapters - The extension lead is ideal for using within your home, offices or even outside in your garden if you need the power

LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN - The slim, compact and lightweight design allows you transport your extension cable around the house or office with ease while also being able to place it behind your desk or on the floor so it saves space and doesn't get in the way

IDEAL FOR 4 APPLIANCES - The Pifco extension lead is perfect for when you have more than one appliance that you need powered - For example within your home/office where you need to power the monitor, laptop/desktop, printer and charger for your smartphone

2 METRE LENGTH - This extension cable features a 2 metre length cable, which provides a longer reach your powered devices - Ideal if you're in a large office and need to power your multiple appliances from distance
description: Product Description This Daweoo extension cable is perfect for using within your home or even in an office for everyone who needs to power their appliances. Key features include: • The ideal solution for when you need to connect more than one appliance when there is just one socket available • This extension lead allows you to connect 4 appliances at anyone time for convenience • Neon light when switched on so you know when it's powering your device • 2 metre cable length - Ideal for using at home or in an office Box Contains 1 x Extension Lead
